title: Payment 3DS Challenge Action Config
description: Config schema for the dev.ucp.payment.three_ds_challenge runtime action.

url.description: Absolute HTTPS URL for the buyer-facing 3DS challenge surface. The loaded surface owns any PSP, issuer, ACS, or 3DS-provider protocol details.

timeout_seconds.description: Number of seconds the platform should wait after loading the surface before treating the action as abandoned or failed. If absent, the platform may apply its own timeout.
